name: Olive Garden Alfredo Fettucine
recipeIngredient: 8 oz cream cheese; cut into bits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the cream cheese, Parmesan, butter (or margarine), and milk.
2. Stir constantly until smooth.
3. Toss the cooked and drained fettuccine lightly with the sauce, coating it well.
4. Store leftovers in an airtight container; freeze for later use.
